  "feedback": "Your level is A2. You can communicate basic ideas clearly and your advice is practical. However, you have several basic errors in subject-verb agreement ('Here is the tips') and demonstratives ('this apps'). You also missed the length requirement of 10 sentences. Your use of 'should' and 'can' is a great strength.",
  "next_steps": [
    "Practice plural forms and their agreement with verbs (is vs are) and demonstratives (this vs these).",

I have applied the CEFR methodology, prioritizing conservative level determination and strict error categorization.",
  "next_steps": [
    "Review the use of articles, especially with singular countable nouns (e.g., 'a very important thing').",
    "Practice noun + preposition collocations (e.g., 'tips on', 'options for').",
